# Summary

Optional summary of the PR. Keep it short.
Remove this section if the bullets already tell the full story.

Release notes are generated from this description:

- Keep bullets short and specific.
- Leave bullets without issue references by default. Add `(#42)` only after verifying that exact GitHub issue through search or explicit assignment. If there is no verified issue, omit the reference entirely — never leave the example number or write `(#issue)`.
- Remove any empty sections.
- Do not include "Original prompt" or any Copilot prompt transcript.

## Added

- Short statement of what was added

## Changed

- Short statement of what changed

## Fixed

- Short statement of what was fixed

## Removed

- Short statement of what was removed

## Security

- Short statement of the security fix

## Deprecated

- Short statement of what is deprecated
